no: BETA: Ports IWD2 content into EET. REQUIRES original IWD2 installed (not Enhanced Edition — IWD2 was never remastered). 3E→2E rule conversion. More experimental than IWD1 port. By Tipun

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: Integrates Icewind Dale 2 content into your EET game. IWD2 quests and areas accessible within the combined game.

co.n: Icewind Dale 2 in Baldur's Gate Enhanced Edition Trilogy
co.tp2n: Icewind Dale 2 in Baldur's Gate Enhanced Edition Trilogy
co.no: Icewind Dale 2 content playable within EET.
